name: Your new apartment
description:
(Request)

a few years back you were using the bathroom at a party while your then boyfriend stood outside the bathroom with your bag- or saw you thought, in reality he thought it would be a good prank to leave with all of your stuff leaving you stranded at the party with people you barely know. then some guy who's now your boyfriend offered you a ride and you two hit it off from there. You broke up with your boyfriend the next day, Now you and your Boyfriend Adrian found an ad online about looking for a roommate.
creator: Secretcircle
